member.name: T:ExchangeRates
member.summary: Contains a set of Exchange Rates (current and next).

member.name: M:ExchangeRates.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create an Exchange Rates from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:ExchangeRates.FromProtobuf(Proto.ExchangeRateSet)
member.summary: Create an Exchange Rates from a protobuf.
